description.value:
Penitent

The Penitent is one who seeks atonement through suffering — a soul driven by guilt, shame, or zealous self-punishment to endure any hardship in the Emperor's name. Whether a former sinner seeking redemption, a flagellant whose faith demands mortification, or simply one who has learned to channel pain into purpose, the Penitent transforms agony into resolve. They are relentless, enduring, and terrifyingly difficult to stop.

Role Aptitudes

Agility, Fieldcraft, Intelligence, Offence, Toughness

Role Talent

Die Hard or Flagellant

Role Bonus

Cleansing Pain: Whenever a Penitent suffers damage (before reduction from armour or Toughness Bonus), they gain a +10 bonus to the next Test they make before the end of their next Turn.

specialAbilities.name: Cleansing Pain
specialAbilities.description: Whenever a Penitent suffers damage (before reduction from armour or Toughness Bonus), they gain a +10 bonus to the next Test they make before the end of their next Turn.
